reasoning: PKGBUILD follows standard AppImage packaging practices: uses verified HTTPS source, pinned checksum, safe extraction method. No dangerous code in top-level scope or pkgver(). Skipped binary is expected for -bin packages.
disagreement_analysis: Deepseek skipped due to transient makepkg download failure, not substantive security concern. Qwen successfully audited PKGBUILD and confirmed safety.
coverage_issues: Neither model audited AppImage binary contents (skipped as binary)
Deepseek failed to review any files due to source download issue
false_negatives: Potential risks in unaudited AppImage binary (e.g., embedded malware, unsafe libraries)
learnings: Add retry logic for source downloads to prevent skips from transient failures
Improve binary handling: flag unaudited binaries in report rather than silent skip
Prioritize PKGBUILD and install hooks over binaries during file selection
Enhance network failure diagnostics in reports
